title: Reverse Linked List
pattern: Linked List â€” In-place Pointer Reversal
coreIdea: Reverse the direction of a singly linked list in-place by iterating through and flipping each node's next pointer to point to its previous node instead.
recognitionCues: asks to reverse a linked list
approach: Maintain prev as null and current as head. At each step, store next node, set current.next = prev, move prev to current, move current to the stored next node. Continue until current is null; prev is the new head.
